Portfolio

Engineering Projects

A selection of design projects spanning structural analysis, mechanism design, and product development. Click any card to expand details and view images.

CAD render / photo
Structural Design · 2023

Lightweight Bracket Assembly

Redesigned a structural mounting bracket to reduce mass by 22% while meeting all fatigue and static load requirements. Topology optimization in ANSYS informed the final organic geometry, which was manufactured via DMLS.

SolidWorks ANSYS Topology Opt. DMLS
CAD render / photo
Mechanism Design · 2022

Adjustable Linkage Mechanism

Designed a 4-bar linkage system for an adjustable fixture application. Performed kinematic synthesis to meet motion requirements, followed by detailed tolerance stack analysis for assembly.

Kinematics CATIA Tolerance Stack CNC
CAD render / photo
Product Development · 2021

Consumer Product Enclosure

Led mechanical design of a handheld consumer device enclosure. Managed DFM for injection molding, coordinated with tooling vendors, and guided two full design revisions through validation testing.

Injection Molding DFM Fusion 360 Prototyping
CAD render / photo
Thermal / Fluid · 2020

Heat Exchanger Redesign

Redesigned a compact heat exchanger for a high-cycle industrial application. CFD and hand calculations validated the new fin geometry, achieving a 30% improvement in thermal efficiency.

CFD Thermal Analysis Sheet Metal Brazing
CAD render / photo
